message:
test(web/e2e): regression coverage for hotkeys, overlays, and mobile UX

- Add Playwright suites for overlay lazy-loading + hotkey registration invariants (cold-start shortcuts, overlay stack behavior, command palette drift).
- Add targeted mobile UX audit coverage (sequence view visible range changes without console errors; iPhone-friendly assertions).
- Add additional e2e coverage for selection determinism, keyboard search UX, and basic visual regression surfaces.
- Add fast bun unit tests for key regressions:
  - App.mobileSwipe.test.ts: ignores swipe targets inside QuickStats/status bars/interactive UI.
  - Model3DView.fullscreen.test.tsx: iOS fullscreen shell class + unpause invariants.
  - selection-guard.*: request-token guard to prevent stale async selection results.
  - CanvasSequenceGridRenderer.smoke.test.ts: renderer can render a frame without throwing.

All tests are designed to fail loudly on UX drift and to keep CI signal high.
